Tests for the `Object.prototype.toString` method with `undefined`, `null`, empty objects, and numbers.


## Files
- **[15.02.04.02-001.js](15.02.04.02-001.js.md)**: Tests the `Object.prototype.toString` method for `undefined` values.
- **[15.02.04.02-002.js](15.02.04.02-002.js.md)**: Tests the `Object.prototype.toString` method for a `null` value.
- **[15.02.04.02-003.js](15.02.04.02-003.js.md)**: Tests the default `toString` method of an empty JavaScript object.
- **[15.02.04.02-004.js](15.02.04.02-004.js.md)**: Tests that `Object.prototype.toString` returns "[object Number]" for the number 123.
